use_cases: Landing page hero for fitness and wellness applications
Onboarding section with multiple call-to-action buttons
Program showcase with category cards and social proof
ai_summary: A comprehensive fitness-themed hero section component featuring animated navigation, gradient backgrounds, social proof with avatars, and program cards. Built with Framer Motion for smooth entrance animations, includes customizable CTAs, navigation dropdowns, and disclaimer text. Designed for health and fitness platforms seeking a professional landing page experience.
